## Checklist

- [ ] Linked the issue this addresses
- [ ] New behaviour is test-driven (a failing test first), bug fixes ship a regression test
- [ ] Gate green locally: `ruff check src/ tests/` + `mypy` + `pytest --cov=src/kagura_agent` (coverage ≥ 95%)
- [ ] Commits are signed off under the DCO (`git commit -s`) — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or PII in the diff
